summary: Synthetic candidate review result for deterministic structured-result comparison checks.

findings.title: Claim support is incomplete
findings.summary: The synthetic claim now names the sanitized evidence label but still needs one caller-owned confirmation before routing.
findings.recommendation: Confirm the sanitized evidence label in the embedding repo before any caller-owned routing.

findings.title: Action boundary is explicit
findings.summary: The review result reports concerns without deciding approval, publication, routing, or remediation ownership.
findings.recommendation: Keep downstream policy and action mapping in the embedding repo.

findings.title: Reviewer scope note added
findings.summary: The candidate adds a generic note that the fixture is for comparison behavior, not domain interpretation.
findings.recommendation: Keep interpretation, thresholds, and follow-up ownership outside the shared package.

provenance.label: Privacy boundary
provenance.value: No real source paths, tracker identifiers, account data, private facts, or domain policy

markdown:
# Summary
Synthetic candidate review result for deterministic structured-result comparison checks.

## Findings
- Medium: Claim support is incomplete.
- Low: Action boundary is explicit.
- Low: Reviewer scope note added.

## Boundary
This fixture uses only generic labels and leaves approval, routing, remediation, and publication policy caller-owned.
